# DiabeticDocs

> The technical documentation for the OpenDiabetic / LocalDiabetic system. Describes the home
> vault, the PHI-blind reminder engine, the on-device edge brain, the voice loop, the PHI
> firewall, and the hash-chained receipts. Every component carries an honest status label —
> LIVE (running and verified), IN BUILD (partly done), or FRAMEWORK (designed, not yet a service).

The defining rule of the system: private health data never leaves the user's box; models flow
down, receipts flow up, PHI crosses never. This is enforced structurally (the edge brain's only
file-write is a non-PHI receipt ledger; the reminder engine never reads a record), not by policy.

## Pages
- [Overview](https://diabeticdocs.com/): the two halves (OpenDiabetic hive + LocalDiabetic vault) and the component map with status.
- [The Firewall](https://diabeticdocs.com/the-firewall): the one invariant and exactly how it is enforced in code.
- [Architecture](https://diabeticdocs.com/architecture): components, data flow, and the receipts.

## Related
- DiabeticTruth (the cited patient facts): https://diabetictruth.org
- DiabeticModels (the model builds, shown + hosted): https://diabeticmodels.com
- Publisher: OpenDiabetic (https://opendiabetic.com)
